item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: America sure is winning, huh?
item.description: Fp Edit: Well, I don't have the money to, but I can't avoid it, having to get an oil change. And last time I priced it, it's gone up nearly $15-$20 just in a month from the same place I was going to go to. I'm tired of struggling. Every day. I'm tired of the anxiety all this is causing. And I'm tired of them getting away with it.
item.dc:creator: SquaresUnfiltered

item.title: GovBrief Today #483
item.description: Michael Dell gave $6.25 billion to Donald Trump's signature children's accounts, and now the Pentagon has handed Dell a $9.7 billion contract. Trump personally told the country to go out and buy Dell, so the contract looks less like a competition than an order being filled. It is not the only one. ProPublica reported today that the White House steered a $620 million Pentagon loan to a startup partly owned by the president's son, Donald Trump Jr. The Pentagon insists both deals were won on the merits and that no company gets special treatment. But one of its own officials says the White House made the call, and a second loan for one of Don Jr.'s companies is already in the queue. Use 5 Calls or Resistbot to tell your representatives to investigate both. I've emailed 7,597 stories over 483 straight nights, free and without ads. The algorithm can't show them all to you. Add your email address at govbrief.today and I will. #GovBriefToday #Resist Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com Don't miss today's quote of the day, images, and data: https://go.govbrief.today/260528-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-may28 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-mail-vote [3] https://go.govbrief.today/la-house [4] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-app [5] https://go.govbrief.today/boat-attack-199 [6] https://go.govbrief.today/carroll-hoffman [7] https://go.govbrief.today/undercover-plates [8] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-wsj-2 [9] https://go.govbrief.today/barrett-swatting [10] https://go.govbrief.today/delaney-arrests [11] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-currency [12] https://go.govbrief.today/freedom-concert [13] https://go.govbrief.today/dell-pentagon [14] https://go.govbrief.today/gold-horses [15] https://go.govbrief.today/vulcan-deal [16] https://go.govbrief.today/people-festival Free Subscription - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.dc:creator: ELKronos

item.title: Dump of the dinojor variety (recycled)
item.description:
Some memes I collect to send to a friend who loves dinosaurs. (Although, who doesn't?) He's probably not seen all of these, because I keep forgetting which ones I've sent and which ones I haven't. Then again, it's a friend who's on Imgur, so he *should've* seen all of these? So .... ¯\_(ツ)_/¯
“Victorian Velociraptor with Violets.” Acrylic and liquid gold leaf on Rives BFK. Made by Adam Mazur. https://www.tumblr.com/adamazur/629013033127231488/adamazur-victorian-velociraptor-with-violets
https://xkcd.com/3012/ (image text: Dinosaur Cosmics)
Chuck Eiler is a digital artist who takes photos of posed figurines and then digitally adds more lighting, textures and detail to each one. He shows the process for this specific image at his Instagram page: https://www.instagram.com/p/C118oSauj_I/?img_index=1 (sometimes outside links get stripped when you click "post to gallery", so I'm really hoping these stay this time)
*her (as @pocsaclypse pointed out)
Almost weekend. Hope yours is good and be kind to others. #memes #dinosaurs #funny #wholesome
item.dc:creator: DutchBoeremeisie

item.title: It's big life change time!
item.description: My work was cutting a lot of jobs, but rather than just firing people randomly, they offered a severance package if you left voluntarily. The goal was to get the old crowd to retire and slim the organization, but i opted for it, got the financials, and they were better than I thought. SO OFF WE GO! I'm a dual US/UK citizen, and my wife is a travel writer, so her business can move anywhere. Edinburgh is one of her favorite cities, so we are pulling the ripcord and moving. Good idea? Bad idea? Who knows! But the universe aligned to tell us "if you wanna do something big, now's the time." So wish us luck. Time for a grand adventure. /side note; Company also slimming down due to "pivoting to being AI focused". So there's a good chance i get a phone call or email in a couple months begging for me to come back.
item.dc:creator: Skrumblecakes

item.dc:creator: Sleave34

item.title: TL;DR: The Trump admin is essentially running spyware on every .gov page
item.description:
(or "figuratively", or "for all intents and purposes", or whatever phrase nitpicking idiots will be satisfied with) The slightly wordier gist: AirBNB co-founder Joe Gebbia, formerly of DOGE infamy, is doing a bunch of shenanigans on the backend of almost every important US government website. https://thedreydossier.substack.com/p/i-found-a-second-votegov-and-its Don't let the Substack account fool you, the entire article is well sourced and documented.
Sorry the post is all wordy and not an AI clapback meme or yet another week-old political cartoon mocking Trump that's already been posted ten times today. Or it's talking about a conspiracy that's boring and real as opposed to doing grassy knoll theory every time some nutter takes a pop shot at the most hated man on the planet. Banality of evil and all that. Also, anybody who starts talking about how "that's just how websites work, this is nothing hehe luddites", they: A) didn't read the rest of the article, or B) don't want people to read the rest of the article.
item.dc:creator: ipointoutnahtzeesbyreplyingtothem

item.title: Hi Imgur
item.description: Fp edit: thanks for the kind words BTW, those that was worried and all. Thanks to yall who followed me on twitch wow Hi Imgur. I got some really bad economical news on top of things. As a chronically ill student relying on social aid, I am not receiving that income for the next months. Which means a lot of debt. Well shucks, I'll figure something out. But hey, trying is what matters. Never had a job since I've been sick most my life, so figuring that out is a bit late. If you've seen my art, read my comments, you'd know I'm a streamer. Specifically vtuber. If you wanna support me, my bipolar crash outs, or so... just be a kind person. Say nice things of the art. Celebrating a year streaming my transitioning on Sunday. Maybe I'll see you there on twitch? Edit: for browser users Twitch.tv/cybjester
item.dc:creator: JesJester

item.dc:creator: whosbestmom

item.title: I devote this dump to YOUR wife so I can close tabs, pt 46 ft. no politics, whatsoever
item.description:
All I ask is that, when you shenan, you do so while properly medicated and hydrated. Is that so much to ask?
The dose makes the poison. This is true of people just as it is of chemical substances. And, really, what are people, if not chemical substances that at least sometimes appear to have agency?
Justice is introducing someone to any kind of shoes other than Crocs. Seriously, you can do better. I believe in you.
I laughed. I had a Star Trek flashback. I grew concerned at the Lovecraftian horrors.
It's not exactly timely, but I love it. Sweet baby Thor, we're living in a weird timeline. I'm gonna do a shot. Anyone else?
Soup and whiskey. More one than the other, at least for now.
Sure, why not?
It me!
"Monsters" is doing a lot of heavy lifting here. Something about... repels and rare candies? And I want to make a parody song like "Don't wanna catch you, so glitch you toooooo." I'll work on it.
RIP to the distance they gained. It was nice while it lasted.
And the alarm is going off, the cops are here, and they don't believe it's my vehicle/house. Also, I'm missing a shoe and that one neighbor who hates me is absolutely NOT helping my case here.
Oh, hey, this reminds me of someone!
Dude, if you want a mustache ride, I'm sure you can find a willing participant. It's ok. We support you in your journey.
I need to rerack my mead. This is my first attempt at making it, and I have no idea how well it'll turn out. Wish me luck!
Youth is a hell of a drug.
He knows how cute he is. Look at his lil FACE! I just wanna smooch him and give him a shrimp! SIR! Get in my jacket and snuggle up with me. This is a threat.
Psh. Therapy works for me, when I work with IT. My problem is that most DRUGS don't work on me. THAT'S.... a whole other can of worms.
Let that sink in!
Then you should make your own clothes, because what you're wearing isn't flattering your figure, Sharon. BYEEEEEEE!
blep.
You forgot the REAL selling point: travel to exotic new places, meet interesting people, and kill them. Death was always a feature, not a bug.
That's my secret, Cap. I'm always hungry.
I want to do this!
The creechur has made their position clear. No more references will be made.
I have much to learn.
I want to see a whole story built around this. The concept just tickles me. People just... getting punched, then robbed, then.... they just continue on with their lives, enlightened...? And we kind of flip back and forth in perspective between the robbers and the newly-made buddhas? One Punch Naan.
I would be SO PROUD!
Do not Mctry. Mcdoobeedoobeedoobeedoo.
Fish a man McFillet, teach him life to eat fish Yoda. Words to live by.
Oh, man. I hope that I'm not popping up TOO often in people's memories. But I'm pretty sure I'm essentially a cryptid for some strangers out there. Like "Hey, do you remember -" 'THAT guy!?! Yeah!' "Huh....anyway, back to business as usual..."
Get on my LEVEL! Shit's only going to get hotter, friends.
I'm also licking my lips to degrees you'll never be able to match. It's a good thing I've got my chapstick.
Love me a red Pine.
You know who you are.
HOO-boy. I feel this one on a spiritual level, and do NOT want to talk about it. I'll be outside, listening to the birds, thank you very much.
No notes.
She knows what she's about. Mad respect.
This is... not a great joke, but I'm saving it so I can make someone groan at it later. Deal with it!
They didn't NEED to put me on blast like that, but they did. And that's ok. I forgive them.
Aw, you've got like... 5 red dots that are almost kind of big! That's cute! I bet if you feed them, they might get bigger! Can you say "Jerrymander"?
Women are confused by me. Fish want my hat.
I'm hoping that my nonsense is more cheerful than confusing. I'm wishing you well, my fellow weirdos.
What is the crime? Eating a succulent, rodent-shaped meal?
You knew who I was when you married me.
Don't make me cup your noodle...
mlem
I'm signed up to have my heart broken countless more times. But that's simply the buy-in for the game of joy, love, discovery, and growth. I've read the terms and condtions. I accept.
Mm... with the heat death of the universe, I guess? Oh, wait...
WHY ARE YOU LIKE THIS?! Get on my shoulder, you ridiculous thing!
Bikes are too efficient! You were on the right track with swimming, but then you didn't have them drink fro the lawn hose.
You go, girls. More power to you.
Ok, this feels... odd to follow, but it DOES feel like something worth knowing. So... it's going to be here, anyway. It's worth knowing how to draw the human figure. Do it right.
We're kind of all over the place today, but that's just the way it is.
Nap Gang representing, up in this bih.
Earth's liquid mantle is a tea.
This, but with the visual of the sub imploding, and the sound of a soda can being opened. "KSksh." Sound on after this point for gifs.
Truly outstanding. My hat's off to you, sir.
Goddammit, I love this every time I see it. I love sharing it with people who haven't seen it. Thank you for being here for it this time. Go in peace, my weird, weird children.
Listen to the universe.
"I don't think, so I'm not affected by politics." Well... I think you just wrapped up this whole conversation for us both. Gotta hand that one to you.
Honestly, they had me with the 1812 Overture. They have my attention and my curiosity.
I love the cackle. It's just fantastic.
Hmmyep.
I'll romance your neck, baby.
And this is how I feel about the remaining stuff, which is quietly buried at the bottom of the post. Keep your voices down.
I've never been one to withhold genuine appreciation.
Look, if you didn't WANT my mouth to water...
Get a clue.
And this is all the response you have to give.
Learn ya something!
item.dc:creator: J4nein4ne

item.title: Russian forces appear to be moving additional air defense systems to guard key rear-area supply routes from Ukrainian mid-range strike drones. Seen here, Ukrainian mid-range strike drones destroying those air defense systems:
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant
